This '''moon''' orbited the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Va'art]], near the [[Roche asteroid field]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. It was the home of the [[Taozin/Legends|taozin]], one of the few creatures which were invisible to [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitives]].

{{Moon-stub}}
